---
title: "RIP-seq: eIF3d and eIF4E binding overlap"
author: "Kate"
date: "2026-05"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggvenn)
library(cowplot)
```

```{r load_data}
LFC_CUTOFF  <- 1
PADJ_CUTOFF <- 0.05
tp_levels <- c("normoxia_1hr", "hypoxia_1hr", "hypoxia_4hr", "hypoxia_24hr")

deseq_results    <- readRDS(here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_results_list.rds"))
deseq_results_4e <- readRDS(here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_4e_results_list.rds"))

cat("3d timepoints:", paste(names(deseq_results),    collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("4e timepoints:", paste(names(deseq_results_4e), collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

# CDF: eIF3d-enriched mRNAs in eIF4E distribution

```{r cdf_3d_in_4e, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
make_cdf_3d_in_4e <- function(tp) {
  flag_3d <- deseq_results[[tp]] |>
    mutate(enriched_3d = log2FoldChange > LFC_CUTOFF & padj < PADJ_CUTOFF & !is.na(padj)) |>
    dplyr::select(gene_id, enriched_3d)

  joined <- deseq_results_4e[[tp]] |>
    filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
    left_join(flag_3d, by = "gene_id") |>
    mutate(enriched_3d = replace_na(enriched_3d, FALSE))

  wt <- wilcox.test(log2FoldChange ~ enriched_3d, data = joined, alternative = "less")
  wilcox_label <- paste0("Wilcoxon p = ", signif(wt$p.value, 2))

  group_labels <- c(
    "TRUE"  = paste0("eIF3d-enriched (n = ", sum(joined$enriched_3d), ")"),
    "FALSE" = paste0("All other genes (n = ", sum(!joined$enriched_3d), ")")
  )

  ggplot(joined, aes(x = log2FoldChange,
                     color = factor(enriched_3d),
                     group = factor(enriched_3d))) +
    stat_ecdf(linewidth = 0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#E69F00", "FALSE" = "grey40"),
                       labels = group_labels) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4,
             label = wilcox_label, size = 3) +
    labs(title = tp,
         x = "log2FC (eIF4E IP / IgG)",
         y = "Cumulative fraction",
         color = NULL) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = c(0.3, 0.85))
}

cdf_plots_3d_in_4e <- lapply(tp_levels, make_cdf_3d_in_4e)
plot_grid(plotlist = cdf_plots_3d_in_4e, ncol = 2, labels = "AUTO")
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "04_cdf_3d_enriched_in_4e.pdf"), width = 10, height = 8)
```

# CDF: eIF4E-enriched mRNAs in eIF3d distribution

```{r cdf_4e_in_3d, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
make_cdf_4e_in_3d <- function(tp) {
  flag_4e <- deseq_results_4e[[tp]] |>
    mutate(enriched_4e = log2FoldChange > LFC_CUTOFF & padj < PADJ_CUTOFF & !is.na(padj)) |>
    dplyr::select(gene_id, enriched_4e)

  joined <- deseq_results[[tp]] |>
    filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
    left_join(flag_4e, by = "gene_id") |>
    mutate(enriched_4e = replace_na(enriched_4e, FALSE))

  wt <- wilcox.test(log2FoldChange ~ enriched_4e, data = joined, alternative = "less")
  wilcox_label <- paste0("Wilcoxon p = ", signif(wt$p.value, 2))

  group_labels <- c(
    "TRUE"  = paste0("eIF4E-enriched (n = ", sum(joined$enriched_4e), ")"),
    "FALSE" = paste0("All other genes (n = ", sum(!joined$enriched_4e), ")")
  )

  ggplot(joined, aes(x = log2FoldChange,
                     color = factor(enriched_4e),
                     group = factor(enriched_4e))) +
    stat_ecdf(linewidth = 0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#56B4E9", "FALSE" = "grey40"),
                       labels = group_labels) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4,
             label = wilcox_label, size = 3) +
    labs(title = tp,
         x = "log2FC (eIF3d IP / IgG)",
         y = "Cumulative fraction",
         color = NULL) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = c(0.3, 0.85))
}

cdf_plots_4e_in_3d <- lapply(tp_levels, make_cdf_4e_in_3d)
plot_grid(plotlist = cdf_plots_4e_in_3d, ncol = 2, labels = "AUTO")
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "04_cdf_4e_enriched_in_3d.pdf"), width = 10, height = 8)
```

# Venn diagrams: eIF3d vs eIF4E enriched genes per timepoint

```{r venn_3d_4e, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
make_venn_3d_4e <- function(tp) {
  enriched_3d <- deseq_results[[tp]] |>
    filter(log2FoldChange > LFC_CUTOFF, padj < PADJ_CUTOFF) |>
    pull(symbol)

  enriched_4e <- deseq_results_4e[[tp]] |>
    filter(log2FoldChange > LFC_CUTOFF, padj < PADJ_CUTOFF) |>
    pull(symbol)

  cat(tp, "| eIF3d:", length(enriched_3d),
      "| eIF4E:", length(enriched_4e),
      "| overlap:", length(intersect(enriched_3d, enriched_4e)), "\n")

  ggvenn(
    list("eIF3d-enriched" = enriched_3d, "eIF4E-enriched" = enriched_4e),
    fill_color  = c("#E69F00", "#56B4E9"),
    stroke_size = 0.5,
    text_size   = 3.5
  ) +
    ggtitle(tp) +
    theme_void()
}

venn_plots <- lapply(tp_levels, make_venn_3d_4e)
plot_grid(plotlist = venn_plots, ncol = 2, labels = "AUTO")
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "04_venn_3d_4e_per_timepoint.pdf"), width = 10, height = 8)
```

```{r}

```
